---
title: "Philipp Lutz"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: prof_pic.jpg
  image-width: 14em
  image-shape: rounded
listing:
  - id: listing-news
    contents: news
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 5
    fields: [date, title]
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:p.lutz@vu.nl"
    - text: Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Ml32muAAAAAJ
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-2373-0180
    - text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/lutzphilipp.bsky.social
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/philipp-lutz-78254489
---

Hi — I'm a political scientist and SNSF Ambizione Fellow at the University of Geneva, Assistant Professor at the Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, and an associated researcher at the [nccr – on the move](https://nccr-onthemove.ch/).

I study the politics of international migration and European integration. My research examines how publics form attitudes toward immigration and perceptions of immigrants, how states cooperate on migration and asylum, and the determinants of migration policies across countries. I received my PhD from the University of Bern in 2019.

You'll find my [research projects](projects.qmd), [publications](publications.qmd), and CV on this site. Feel free to get in touch.

## News

::: {#listing-news}
:::
